name: TANGER FACT.OUTLET DL-,01
summary: TANGER FACT.OUTLET DL-,01 is a real estate investment trust (REIT) specializing in owning, operating, and developing open-air outlet centers in the United States and Canada. The company leases retail space to a diverse mix of brand-name retailers and manufacturers, offering discounted merchandise to consumers. Tanger Factory Outlet Centers is headquartered in Greensboro, North Carolina.
